title: elaphoglossum nicaraguense
intro: Elaphoglossum nicaraguense, also known as Nicaraguan elaphoglossum, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that help to soothe wounds and infections. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum nicaraguense include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and preventing the growth of bacteria and fungi. Herbal preparations of Elaphoglossum nicaraguense include infusions and decoctions made from the plant's leaves, which can be consumed as a tea to reap its medicinal benefits.
